description_long: This is a cylindrical lotion container with a smooth, matte white exterior and a rounded cap. The cap appears to be slightly wider than the body, creating a subtle lip at the top. On the lower front, there is a small rectangular label featuring a minimalist logo and the text 'MY STUDIO'. The container is seamless with no visible dispensing mechanism, suggesting the cap is likely screw-on. The overall design is clean and modern, with no additional graphics or patterns. The object is compact and portable, suitable for carrying in a bag or placing on a bathroom counter.
description: A sleek, matte white cylindrical lotion container with a rounded screw-on cap and a small 'MY STUDIO' logo label on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the logo label and the clean, smooth surface of the container.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the rounded cap and the cylindrical shape, with no visible dispensing mechanism.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, uninterrupted surface of the container without any labels or graphics.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the uniform cylindrical form and the seamless connection between cap and body.
